---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "A selection of my data science and quantitative finance work."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid 
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
body-class: "projects-listing-view" 
---
